data.id: TR-PICUS-TIER1-CREDENTIAL_HIVE_ACCESS: Unauthorized SAM/SECURITY Registry Hive Access
data.name: TR-PICUS-TIER1-CREDENTIAL_HIVE_ACCESS: Unauthorized SAM/SECURITY Registry Hive Access for Credential Dumping
data.description: CRITICAL CREDENTIAL ACCESS DETECTION: Detects unauthorized access to Windows credential storage registry hives (SAM, SECURITY, SYSTEM) observed in 8+ undetected Picus instances. Threat actors access these hives for offline password cracking or credential extraction. Monitors for registry operations on HKLM\SAM, HKLM\SECURITY, and HKLM\SYSTEM from non-system processes. Also detects file-level access to %SystemRoot%\System32\config\SAM (offline hive copy). Observable from detonation: PowerShell, cmd.exe, and credential dumping tools (LaZagne, Mimikatz) accessing these restricted hives. Critical for T1003 (OS Credential Dumping).
data.contents: ((registry.key_path contains 'HKLM\\SAM' OR registry.key_path contains 'HKLM\\SECURITY' OR registry.key_path contains 'HKLM\\SYSTEM') AND (process.name contains 'powershell.exe' OR process.name contains 'cmd.exe' OR process.name contains 'certutil.exe' OR process.name contains 'reg.exe') AND process.name != 'lsass.exe' AND process.name != 'services.exe' AND process.name != 'svchost.exe') OR (file.path contains 'C:\\Windows\\System32\\config\\SAM' OR file.path contains 'C:\\Windows\\System32\\config\\SECURITY' OR file.path contains 'C:\\Windows\\System32\\config\\SYSTEM') AND (process.name contains 'powershell.exe' OR process.name contains 'cmd.exe' OR process.name contains 'certutil.exe') AND process.integrity_level != 'system'

techniques.name: OS Credential Dumping: Security Account Manager

data.expectedCoverage: 8+ undetected credential dumping attempts via registry hive access
